description: When consumer repos haven't updated their governance submodule in >7 days, they're probably drifting further behind and integration will get harder. Submodule staleness compounds — each day of drift adds more commits to reconcile, increasing the risk that consumer-side governance snippets reference outdated articles or missing policies.
source_patterns: belief:2026-03-17-ga-governance-integration — ga submodule stale, no CLAUDE.md governance section
belief:2026-03-17-ix-governance-integration — ix CLAUDE.md references Articles 1-7 (should be 1-11), likely stale from older submodule version
